calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and for a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: K. Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Clifford Wang, Esq. for and with the Petitioner JinSong Pan and Co-Petitioner WenFei Jiang, as guardian ad litem for the Minor JinYi Pan, parties were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Jason Pan and Change of Name of the Minor to Joanna JinYi Pan.
Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
